assessment_objectives.objective: roles and responsibilities for role-based cybersecurity / data privacy training are defined.
events that require role-based security training content updates are defined.
role-based cybersecurity / data privacy training is provided to organizational personnel before authorizing access to the system or sensitive / regulated data.
role-based security training is provided to organizational personnel before performing assigned duties.
role-based cybersecurity / data privacy training is provided to organizational personnel per an organization-defined frequency after initial training.
role-based cybersecurity / data privacy training is provided to organizational personnel when required by system changes or following organization-defined events.
the frequency at which to provide role-based security training to assigned personnel after initial training is defined.
the frequency at which to update role-based security training content is defined.
role-based security training content is updated per an organization-defined frequency.
role-based security training content is updated following organization-defined events.
lessons learned from internal or external security incidents or breaches are incorporated into role-based training.
events that require role-based security training are defined.

incident response training for system users consistent with assigned roles and responsibilities is provided within an organization-defined time period of assuming an incident response role or responsibility or acquiring system access.
incident response training for system users consistent with assigned roles and responsibilities is provided when required by system changes.
incident response training for system users consistent with assigned roles and responsibilities is provided per an organization-defined frequency thereafter.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters:
at least every 12 months, or when there are significant
incidents or significant changes to risks
